titles: 대출 규제 뒤 집값, 지금 사면 호구일까, 무주택자가 봐야 할 신호 3가지
집값 오른다 내린다 싸우는 사이, 무주택자가 진짜 봐야 할 3가지
스트레스 DSR 3단계, 내 대출한도 얼마나 줄었나, 영끌 막차의 진실

image_concepts.A: 두 갈래 길(매수↑/관망↓) 앞에서 멈춰 고민하는 무주택 실수요자 + 아파트 단지 실루엣
image_concepts.B: 아파트 위에 떠 있는 빨강·노랑·초록 신호등 3등을 올려다보며 계약서를 든 무주택 실수요자

color_psychology.note: 썸네일 3종에 4매트릭스 중 3개를 분산 적용 — 1번 비교 대비(양방향 딜레마), 2번 위기 알림(대출규제·한도 축소), 3번 행동 가이드(신호 체크리스트). 시니어 시인성 우선.

1.rationale: 사면 호구 vs 영영 못 삼 — 양방향 딜레마를 빨강/초록 대비로

3.rationale: 전망 그만 보고 이 3개만 체크 — 행동 유도

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A 실사. 두 갈래로 갈라지는 길 앞에서 손으로 턱을 괴고 고민하는 30~40대 무주택 실수요자. 한쪽 길 위로 상승 화살표, 반대쪽엔 하락 화살표, 뒤로 한국형 아파트 단지 실루엣.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of a worried Korean man in his late 30s wearing a casual jacket, standing at a forking road, hand on his chin in deep hesitation, attractive likeable face with an anxious conflicted expression. Above the left path glows a green upward arrow, above the right path a red downward arrow, symbolizing a buy-or-wait dilemma. Behind him stands a silhouette of a dense Korean high-rise apartment complex at dusk. Deep navy-blue background with high contrast; red (#E63946) and green (#06A77D) arrow accents, strong rim lighting on his face for senior viewer readability on mobile. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A 변주(위기 알림). 같은 무주택 실수요자가 큰 빨간 하락 화살표와 DSR 게이지가 줄어드는 패널 앞에서 충격받은 표정. 대출한도 축소 위기감.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic photograph of a Korean woman in her early 40s with an exaggerated shocked, distressed expression, attractive warm likeable face, gripping a house contract document. Beside her a glowing financial panel shows a shrinking loan-limit gauge and a large bold red downward arrow with a prominent percentage symbol as a visual anchor, representing tightened mortgage regulation. Solid dark background (#1D1D1D) with deep red accent (#E63946) and a bright yellow numerical highlight (#FFD60A). Extreme high contrast and oversized expression on her face for senior viewer readability on mobile. A faint Korean apartment skyline glows in the upper background. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 B 실사(행동 가이드). 무주택 실수요자가 계약서를 들고, 아파트 실루엣 위에 떠 있는 빨강·노랑·초록 3색 신호등을 올려다보는 결단의 순간. 신호 3개 = 판단 도구.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic clean cinematic photograph of a determined Korean man in his 40s, attractive likeable confident face, holding a house contract and looking up at a large floating three-light traffic signal (red, yellow, green) hovering above a Korean apartment complex silhouette. The three signal lights symbolize three decision signals, glowing as bright vivid anchors. Bright high-key composition with a clean light background and deep navy-and-teal gradient on the upper sky; red (#E63946), yellow (#FFD60A) and green (#06A77D) signal lights as high-saturation accents for senior viewer readability on mobile. Organized confident layout. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.
